keen_eye_ring.name: Keen Eye Ring
keen_eye_ring.description: A silver ring set with a hawk's eye stone. Your strikes find weak points more often.

flame_pendant.name: Flame Pendant
flame_pendant.description: A pendant holding a trapped ember. Status effects you inflict linger longer.

iron_band.name: Iron Band
iron_band.description: A crude iron ring that dulls incoming blows.

haste_charm.name: Haste Charm
haste_charm.description: A charm that hums with restless energy. Active skills recover faster.

berserker_tooth.name: Berserker Tooth
berserker_tooth.description: A fang from a beast that never stopped fighting. More power, less protection.

mystic_lens.name: Mystic Lens
mystic_lens.description: A crystalline monocle that amplifies magical resonance. Magic weapons proc more often.
